metadata.direction: Word ID → list of grammar point IDs that reference this word in their examples.

field_notes.mapping: Links vocabulary to relevant grammar. Enables 'what grammar should I learn to use this word?' queries.

metadata.source: Derived cross-reference built from data/grammar/grammar.json by build/transform/cross_links.py.
